---
title: "v9a_songunet_edm"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

## Description

NCSN++/SongUNet candidate trained with an EDM denoising objective.
This version moves away from direct FM velocity prediction and tests a CorrDiff-style diffusion objective.

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Architecture | SongUNetPosEmbd / NCSN++ style U-Net |
| Objective | EDM denoising on `HR - mu` residual |
| Input channels | `x_t`, `mu`, `lr`, mask, distance-to-coast, latitude |
| Patch size | 256 |
| Model channels | 128 |
| Sigma range | 0.002 to 80 |
| Motivation | test a proven diffusion downscaling objective against FM |
| Research inspiration | PhysicsNeMo SongUNet, CorrDiff, EDM |

## Variables

::: {.panel-tabset}
### thetao
::: {.figure-grid}
::: {.figure-slot}
#### HR / CNO / CNO+FM
`assets/figures/v9a_songunet_edm/thetao/presentation.png`
:::
::: {.figure-slot}
#### HR-LR / CNO Residual / FM Residual
`assets/figures/v9a_songunet_edm/thetao/residuals.png`
:::
::: {.figure-slot}
#### CNO Error / FM Error
`assets/figures/v9a_songunet_edm/thetao/errors.png`
:::
:::
### so
`assets/figures/v9a_songunet_edm/so/`
### zos
`assets/figures/v9a_songunet_edm/zos/`
### uo
`assets/figures/v9a_songunet_edm/uo/`
### vo
`assets/figures/v9a_songunet_edm/vo/`
:::

## Metrics

`assets/metrics/v9a_songunet_edm.csv`
